side_effects.description: Random spots of blue appearing on left hand after injections; later attributed to ink transfer from alcohol swab or packaging rather than a true side effect

protocol_notes: OP has been injecting GHK-Cu for approximately 4 weeks. Disinfects the top of the vial before injection but had not been cleaning the entire vial. Blue spots on hand were determined by commenters to be ink transfer from labels or packaging via alcohol swabs, not a peptide reaction.
